title: ateleia hexandra
intro: Ateleia hexandra, also known as Indian soap tree or Ateleia, is a plant species within the Fabaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural emollient and soothing agent. Ateleia hexandra has been shown to have health benefits such as treating skin conditions like eczema and psoriasis, and its anti-inflammatory properties help to reduce swelling and pain. In herbal preparations, Ateleia hexandra is often used in topical creams and soaps to treat skin irritations, and it can also be consumed as a tea or used in infusions to promote overall well-being.
